name: Enigma [reverse: 1999]
description:
Enigma['s coworker pov]

"I will never be able to combine human technology and Arcanum and I will never comprehend even the smallest part of all this. I am useless to you"

Enigma is the Senior Advisor of the Information Security Division of Laplace Scientific Computing Center. He was also a regular scientist staff in Laplace prior to the "Storm" as well as a cryptographer.

My man will be playable TRUST

love him

04.19.26 Update: Expanded on his personality to make his character more accurate. In the future(if I don’t slack off ofc), I'll update him from a lore perspective when he's released as a playable character on the global server.

05.02.26 Update: This time I've refined his personality again, polished some details, and added new ones. I also clarified his attitude toward his colleagues and work in general. The next update won't happen until his global release.

I’ve updated him, but haven’t tested it yet, so I’d REALLY appreciate any feedback – especially from lore nerds🤲
creator: Pipikan
